results.title: THORNE DEBUTS 'NOW I KNOW' – A NATIONWIDE CAMPAIGN ...
results.content: # THORNE DEBUTS ’NOW I KNOW’ – A NATIONWIDE CAMPAIGN BUILT ON PROVEN SCIENCE AND CONFIDENT CHOICES. THORNE DEBUTS ’NOW I KNOW’ – A NATIONWIDE CAMPAIGN BUILT ON PROVEN SCIENCE AND CONFIDENT CHOICES. NEW YORK, January 20, 2026 – Thorne, the leader in science-backed health and wellness solutions, today unveiled its nationwide, omni-channel Now I Know campaign, designed to help consumers navigate modern wellness with confidence, clarity, and evidence they can trust. “Now I Know reflects Thorne’s commitment to rigorous science, clinical expertise, and uncompromising standards so people can make informed decisions and move forward with confidence”. For more than 40 years, Thorne has set the standard for excellence in health and wellness. Now I Know is reinforced by recent Thorne-commissioned research highlighting the wellness confidence gap. Thorne is the leader in science-backed health and wellness solutions built to connect the science of performance with the science of people. For press inquiries, please email us at media@thorne.com. For press inquiries, please email us at  media@thorne.com.
